query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A close-up image of smooth, flowing bands of color arranged in horizontal, curved layers. The upper portion transitions from pale green to soft yellow, followed by warm orange and peach tones, and deepening into vibrant pink and magenta at the bottom. The colors blend seamlessly at their boundaries.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred abstract image where smooth, flowing bands of color — pale green, soft yellow, warm orange, peach, vibrant pink, and magenta — streak horizontally in curved, indistinct layers. No recognizable subject emerges; the entire frame dissolves into pure color, gesture, and movement, abandoning representational clarity in favor of luminous, sweeping forms created through deliberate motion during exposure.
